urlPolicy: New product/blog URLs must be unique and append-only. Do not 301/302 old URLs to new URLs.
canonicalPolicy: Every HTML page must have an absolute self-canonical URL.
searchPolicy: Header search redirects to products.html?q=keyword; products page filters product cards by data-search/title/description/image alt.
revalidationPolicy: Path-only ISR enabled. Product, blog and news detail pages are generated per URL and revalidated by exact path; old URLs are append-only and not rebuilt unless explicitly requested.
